description_long: This is a large, modern luxury house set within a spacious, walled property. The structure features a flat roof, multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, and extensive use of white and beige exterior finishes. The grounds include a swimming pool, a tennis court, landscaped areas with palm trees, and a driveway leading to a main entrance. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property is surrounded by a low wall, with outdoor amenities and open spaces integrated into the overall design.
description: A sprawling modern luxury house with flat roofs, large windows, a pool, tennis court, and landscaped grounds within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central courtyard, pool, tennis court, and palm trees in the landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, tennis court, and the arrangement of the house's rectangular volumes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, tennis court, pool, and the full extent of the walled property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the driveway, pool, and the geometric layout of the house and grounds.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide, flat approach, large modern door, and minimalistic overhang, flanked by geometric landscaping.
